error_signature: Empty List after binding Collection List
title: Empty List displayed when binding OrderDetails collection
symptom: On Test 2, the table shows 'Empty List' despite data being fetched from the OrderDetails collection. The data is visible in the results screen but not in the bound table.
applies_when: Binding OrderDetails collection to a table
Fetching data using orderid as input
not_this_if: Data is correctly displayed in other components
Using a different collection that returns multiple records
root_cause: The issue arises because the OrderDetails endpoint in Xano is designed to return a single record based on the order ID, while the binding expects a list of records. This mismatch leads to the table displaying 'Empty List'.
fix_steps: Bind the specific properties of the OrderDetails object instead of the entire object.
For example, bind OrderDetails.data.description directly to the text element.
agent_instruction: Bind the specific properties of the OrderDetails data directly in the table instead of the whole object.
